keyMappings:
" map <space> <command>
mapkey <c-m> <c-[>
map cc visitPreviousTab
unmap o
unmap O
unmap b
unmap B
unmap t
unmap i
unmap ` 
unmap st
map o Vomnibar.activateInNewTab
map O Vomnibar.activate
map b Vomnibar.activateBookmarksInNewTab
map B Vomnibar.activateBookmarks
map tt createTab
map td moveTabToNewWindow
map i enterInsertMode
map h previousTab
map l nextTab
map u moveTabLeft
map d moveTabRight
map U moveTabLeft count=99
map D moveTabRight count=99
map 9 scrollLeft
map 0 scrollRight
map qh closeTabsOnLeft
map ql closeTabsOnRight
map H goBack
map L goForward
map J scrollPageDown
map K scrollPageUp
map ga firstTab
map gh firstTab
map gl lastTab
unmap m
unmap <<
unmap >>
map < goPrevious
map > goNext
map ma Marks.activateCreateMode swap
map ' Marks.activateGotoMode swap
map p Marks.activateCreateMode
map P Marks.activateGotoMode
map F LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue
map R reload hard
map sW Vomnibar.activate keyword=w
map sw Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=w
map sG Vomnibar.activate keyword=go
map sg Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=go
map sY Vomnibar.activate keyword=yo
map sy Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=yo
map sA Vomnibar.activate keyword=am
map sa Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=am
map sM Vomnibar.activate keyword=gm
map sm Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=gm
map sR Vomnibar.activate keyword=ra
map sr Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=ra
map sT Vomnibar.activate keyword=tr
map st Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=tr
map sH Vomnibar.activate keyword=ha
map sh Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=ha
map sP Vomnibar.activate keyword=pr
map sp Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=pr
map sS Vomnibar.activate keyword=sp
map ss Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=sp
map sN Vomnibar.activate keyword=nix
map sn Vomnibar.activateInNewTab keyword=nix
map M toggleMuteTab
map \ passNextKey normal
map <c-l> <anyOldJunk>
map <c-/> createTab chrome-extension://dbepggeogbaibhgnhhndojpepiihcmeb/pages/options.html
searchEngines:
w: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
# More examples.
#
# (Vimium supports search completion Wikipedia, as
# above, and for these.)
#
nix: https://search.nixos.org/packages?query=%s&from=0&size=60&sort=relevance&channel=unstable Search NixOS packages
ra: https://docs.racket-lang.org/search/index.html?q=%s Racket Docs
tr: https://docs.racket-lang.org/search/index.html?q=L%3Atyped%2Fracket%2Fbase%20%s Typed-Racket Docs
ha: https://hoogle.haskell.org/?hoogle=%s Hoogle
pr: https://pursuit.purescript.org/search?q=%s Pursuit
sp: https://startpage.com/sp/search/?q=%s StartPage
go: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s Google
yo: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
gm: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google maps
am: https://www.amazon.com/s/?field-keywords=%s Amazon
# qw: https://www.qwant.com/?q=%s Qwant
